rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §31.026, which governs SBOE contracts for instructional material purchasing and licensing.
quote: Sec. 31.026. CONTRACT; PRICE. (a) The State Board of Education may execute a contract for the purchase or licensing of each adopted instructional material.
_note: No overlap between proposed property tax change and instructional material contract statute.
